name: TNP Social Spin and Chat
description: Come for a gentle ride with TNP and get the recovery in from a hard weeks racing or a steady lead in to the weekend.

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Champs Elysees
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Flanders Endurance Series
description:
Flanders Endurance Series is focused on long distance rides/races.
The global distance of these fondo's will always be around 100km or 2.30h depending on the course of the day.
Use these type of rides to build up your foundation and/or stamina ...
Do you have to finish the ride ? No, that’s not necessary, only when you want to end up in the results you have to do the « whole » ride !
Is this a race ? There will be results displayed for those who like to race it, but you can also tackle it as a great build-me-up endurance training.
Late join is possible.

Heart rate monitors are necessary when you want to end up in the ZP results !

It’s also a great opportunity for you to earn those missing ROUTE badges

#keepmoving #BZReCyclingClub #jerseyunlock

Spotify playlist : BZR`s FTP Booster
Facebook Group : https://m.facebook.com/groups/bzrecyclingclub/

name: PAOLO BARBERA FRIDAY MORNING by Scannellatori Seriali
description:
Coach Paolo Barbera is a Certified Triathlon and Ironman Coach and the founder of Active Kids, a sporting clinic to help children and adults in the prevention and treatment of obesity through healty nutrition and tailored training programs

Paolo is an experienced thriathlete and cyclist, in 2017 opened an endurance training center in milan, Tri60, specilized in indoor training.

In the last ten years Paolo has developed training programs for triathletes, runners and cyclists. Indoor training plays a key role to control pace, cadence and mental strenght.

Paolo’s workouts are designed to mix different training zones aiming to maximize results in a very short time. Paolo’s coachees by following his workouts, at the right intensity, have achieved challenging results.

Paolo’s indoor training workouts have different lenghts to meet every athlete needs.

Paolo writes news and points of view for scannellatoriseriali.com

Follow us on Instagram and join our team! https://www.instagram.com/scannellatori_seriali/

IT IS NOT HOW YOU START BUT HOW YOU FINISH

LET’S GO RUNNING

eventSubgroups.name: PAOLO BARBERA FRIDAY MORNING by Scannellatori Seriali (E)

name: Friday Friendly with Social Watts
description:
Friday Friendly Ride
Shake off the week and ease into your weekend with our Friday Friendly
ride! This Friday afternoon is all about a gentle pace, perfect for riding
out any lingering work stress and warming up for a fantastic weekend ahead.

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: FRR CLASSICA SERIES - BELGICA - ITT
description:
Flamme Rouge Racing are excited to bring you our CLASSICA events to honour the great one day monuments of world cycling.

ITALIA
BELGICA
FRANCAIS

Each event will offer 3 races Friday to Sunday, using three formats - iTT / Scratch / Points - each race will convert to points, based on segments and finish - a riders points total will be drawn from all 3 races, do more, score more!

Each event will center around the type of course and terrain of the monument, with the actual race day event being of a length that is fitting for the monument.

Classica races are part of the FRR Weekend Warrior Race Series for which there will be at least 10 WW events, refer to website for the Schedule and rules:

Series Schedule
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-schedule/

Rules
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-rules

Event Basics
- Public events - MIXED RACING
- Five Max 30day ZRS ranged pens
- Mandatory racing experience - HRM - Smart Trainers


- Season long Order of Merit (OoM)
- Best 7 scoring events to count (an event counts the points from all 3 races over

FRR Registered riders form the OoM - Top 10 earn prizes on condition they are FRR Subscribers 

For all details, registration and how to become an FRR subscriber vist our website:
https://flammerougeracing.com/

Primary Communication via DISCORD

Discord - RACE channel for questions, updates and lively chat - it is by far the best place to clarify or report anything during the series

Invite link: https://discord.com/invite/nQNWHQK6PS

Smart Trainers - HRM
- Smart Trainers are mandatory
- Race Control can verify with the Zwift platform 
- HRMs are mandatory

So be SMART and use a SMART trainer as your PRIMARY power source where you can....

FRR Code of Conduct
- We expect the best racing behavior from all riders, if riders have an issue then always contact race control via email first, we will investigate every request raised.
- In race we do not expect riders to abuse others, flag, report to race control, screen shot etc.... riders who ignore this will be DQ'd for the season
- Discord chat remains objective and banter - anything more will be removed and warnings/bans will be issued

And finally remember we all do this for fun and exercise so ride on and enjoy the FRR events....stay safe and if it starts to hurt then welcome to the fun zone...! 
(But stop if it really does hurt too much please!)

name: WKG Crampeur
description:
WKG Crampeur

Big distance - huge elevation! The Crampeur by WKG is a weekly race for all categories, taking on the longest, toughest and tallest routes on Zwift.

So, be sure to stretch your muscles and top up on electrolytes to combat the lactic acid during this relentless struggle for body and mind.

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Velos Recovery Friday
description: After a hard TTT last night it's time to engage in a light, active recovery ride to keep the muscles turning over and maintain fitness without causing further fatigue. Have a chat whilst you roll with our crew and discuss how your team can go that bit faster next week.

name: Friday Ride C
description:
Soyez les bienvenu(e)s dans le ride du club BIKES (tag : BIKES)
Un nouveau parcours tous les vendredis ! une bonne idée pour être certain de terminer un maximum de parcours et gagner des points.
Ouvert à tous les niveaux mais notre Leader niveau C roulera à 2.2-2.5wkg

Rejoignez-nous ! ajoute le tag BIKES à ton pseudo Zwift et rejoins le club BIKES FRANCE
sur Companion

Discutez sur Discord: https://discord.gg/a8wYvgw
Notre Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZwiftBikes
Rejoins-nous : https://www.bikesfrance.com/

***ENGLISH***
JOIN OUR NEW CLUB for non-french riders on Companion : club BIKES WORLD,
English spoken !
The idea is to bring together riders from all over the world, no matter where you come from, no matter your level, no matter if you are already in a club or not; just have fun !

A new route every friday! A great idea to make sure you complete as many routes as possible and earn points.
Open to all levels but our Level C Leader will be riding at 2.2-2.5wkg

name: Run 10K Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the longest running daily led running event on Zwift. This was the event that kickstarted the NoblePro Running Club in support of a world record attempt at consecutive daily10k runs.
The event has a healthy group of leaders who are friendly and chatty and will help you achieve your goal, not matter your experience. Feel free to join in the chat and become addicted like we all are.

Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it's not a race.
If you don't want to run 10k then come along for as long as you wish, the support is always appreciated.
The event runs at the same time each day, each day of the week there is a different course.

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/

https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

eventSubgroups.name: Run 10K Every Day Powered By NoblePro (E)

name: Ascenders Brunch Bunch Ride
description:
Welcome to [ASC] - Beanie's Brunch Bunch for a chilled ride around the virtual roads of Zwift. Each week the course will vary so, whether you're a beginner just starting out on your first group rides, recovering from injury, or just looking for a steady paced ride then come and join us. We aim to provide a safe encouraging ride for you to enjoy. You’ll be very welcome in the Brunch Bunch

This is a group ride and not a race so please respect the pace and ride with the group. The fence will be used to aid regrouping and politely remind those out front to ease back to the main group before the 60 second countdown ends. If you're a stronger confident rider then ride behind the Lead Beacon and lend a draft for others who may need it.


Ascenders Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/AscendersZwift

Ascenders Discord Channel: https://discord.gg/cBfQ5jkrPh

name: TEAM ITALY From Walk to Run 5K
description:
WELCOME TO ALL RUNNERS! 5Km running is your goal? This is a Run-Walk-Run event, that which will help you to start running, to return after an injury, to increase your training or simply to train for weelness. The event is structured as workouts to give you the opportunity to manage the paces according to your personal pace references for a functional aerobic improvement training. Each workout will include initial walking warm up, so please set your treadmills to exit the starting pen all in group walking and follow the subsequent messages on the screen. The Running Division of Team Italy is a new reality that is added to the already more acclaimed Bike Division. It was born from the passion between two runner friends, zwift users, and boss of Team, which we thanks. So, we hope you enjoy with us. Also in the other events, which you can find on our Facebook page. Please, add tag [ITA] after your name. Stay connected with other runners via our Team Italy Discord Server (Running/Corsa Section - Audio Channel) https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv

This is the Facebook group of Team Italy Runners https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftrunningitaly/

 , and Team Italy https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly

 Join us! Have fun! Run On!. #zwiftrunningitaly #teamitaly Benvenuti a tutti i Runners ! Il vostro obiettivo è quello di correre 5km?Questo è un evento Corsa-Camminata-Corsa, che potrà aiutarvi ad iniziare a correre, a rientrare dopo un infortunio, ad incrementare il vostro allenamento o semplicemente per il benessere. L’evento è strutturato come workouts per darvi la possibilità di gestire le andature secondo i vostri personali riferimenti di passo per un allenamento funzionale di miglioramento aerobico. Ogni workouts prevedrà un riscaldamento camminando, quindi vi preghiamo di impostare i vostri Tapis Roulant per uscire dalla griglia di partenza tutti in gruppo camminando e seguire a video i successivi messaggi. La Divisione Running del Team Italy è una recente realtà aggiunta alla già acclamata divisione Cycling. Nata dalla passione di due amici runners, utenti Zwift, ed il Boss del Team Italy, che ringraziamo. Grazie anche a voi, ed alla vostra passione questa realtà sta crescendo e divenendo sempre più attiva. Per tutte le info necessarie potete trovare la nostra pagina Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftrunningitaly/

 La pagina del Team Italy: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly

 ed il canale Discord, Running audio channel, per tenerci in contatto: https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv

name: PACK🐺 1.5 Morning Cuppa
description:
This PACK 1.5 beginner friendly event is aimed at Zwifters looking for a group ride experience at an average lap pace of around 1.3-1.5w/kg.

On the flat, the pace will be controlled to ensure the group draft effect is kept under tight control with a target of 1.5w/kg on any hills or upslopes. The Leader will text instructions as well as use discord voice chat as communication is the key to a good group ride. Sweepers will also be in operation to assist in helping the group stay together at the back.

All riders will appear in the same kit and you can optionally add (PACK) after your name to show support of the group. Please respect the pace set by the leader, this is a group ride not a race. #strongertogether

Finally, if you are just starting your zwift experience, please join our facebook group and PACK Club for tips on group riding, friendly advice and to answer any questions you have.

PACK Club:
https://www.zwift.com/clubs/Pack/join

Facebook Group #zwiftpack
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftpack/

PACK Events:
https://www.zwift.com/events/tag/pack

Discord Voice Chat:
https://discord.gg/cce7ers

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Friday Night Fun Race
description:
Get ready for the Friday Night Fun Race – the perfect way to unwind and kick-off your weekend! This is fast, friendly, and totally unserious racing designed for pure enjoyment.

Every week brings a different course and theme, so you never know what fun-fueled surprise awaits! And if that wasn't enough, everyone starts with a 'BOOST' power-up, with extras available throughout the race – that’s a speed increase for a few seconds – use it wisely!

SCHEDULE
Races are held weekly on Friday evenings across various timezones.

CATEGORIES
You’ll be categorized by your existing Racing Score for fair competition. But don't worry – race results won't impact your score, keeping the pressure low and the fun high.

Sign up for the ultimate Friday night race – fun-filled, feel-good, and guaranteed to make your weekend start with a bang!

name: TNP The No Prisoners Power Test April 5 Minute Power Challenge Week 1
description:
This is a month long challenge running throughout April, designed to test one of the most important efforts in Zwift racing.
Three Sisters Reverse Race distance: 6.9 km (lead in 3.2 km, segment length 3.7 km)
Zwift races are often won or lost in efforts around five minutes. Short climbs, hard attacks, and decisive selections usually happen in that window. If you can produce strong power for five minutes, you can stay with the front when races split. This challenge is designed to test exactly that. Hit some of Zwift’s most iconic climbs full gas and see how your best time stacks up.
"No April fools here. Just power, passion and heart. Short lead in.
One climb.
Fastest time wins.

Full gas. No prisoners."
Results will be on https://team-not-pogi-hub.vercel.app/

name: Stage 6a: Zwift Games: Epiloch | Women Only
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

description:

name: ZLDR AYOP Hour
description:
Start your day on the right foot or the left. Come to our 60 minute at your own pace. Run, walk, chat, laugh and get your day moving on a positive note! Attitude is 90% of any situation so let’s make this day the best day and get you in the best mindset so you can be the best you!

ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your running dreams and help you develop your running skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!
ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your running dreams and help you develop your running skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!

Strava Club: https://www.strava.com/clubs/zldr2020
Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/
Discord Invitation (not required for the run)
https://discord.com/invite/PuFctEnWyn
ZLDR website for Challenge Months: https://www.zldr.club

name: FRR CLASSICA SERIES - BELGICA - ITT
description:
Flamme Rouge Racing are excited to bring you our CLASSICA events to honour the great one day monuments of world cycling.

ITALIA
BELGICA
FRANCAIS

Each event will offer 3 races Friday to Sunday, using three formats - iTT / Scratch / Points - each race will convert to points, based on segments and finish - a riders points total will be drawn from all 3 races, do more, score more!

Each event will center around the type of course and terrain of the monument, with the actual race day event being of a length that is fitting for the monument.

Classica races are part of the FRR Weekend Warrior Race Series for which there will be at least 10 WW events, refer to website for the Schedule and rules:

Series Schedule
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-schedule/

Rules
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-rules

Event Basics
- Public events - MIXED RACING
- Five Max 30day ZRS ranged pens
- Mandatory racing experience - HRM - Smart Trainers


- Season long Order of Merit (OoM)
- Best 7 scoring events to count (an event counts the points from all 3 races over

FRR Registered riders form the OoM - Top 10 earn prizes on condition they are FRR Subscribers 

For all details, registration and how to become an FRR subscriber vist our website:
https://flammerougeracing.com/

Primary Communication via DISCORD

Discord - RACE channel for questions, updates and lively chat - it is by far the best place to clarify or report anything during the series

Invite link: https://discord.com/invite/nQNWHQK6PS

Smart Trainers - HRM
- Smart Trainers are mandatory
- Race Control can verify with the Zwift platform 
- HRMs are mandatory

So be SMART and use a SMART trainer as your PRIMARY power source where you can....

FRR Code of Conduct
- We expect the best racing behavior from all riders, if riders have an issue then always contact race control via email first, we will investigate every request raised.
- In race we do not expect riders to abuse others, flag, report to race control, screen shot etc.... riders who ignore this will be DQ'd for the season
- Discord chat remains objective and banter - anything more will be removed and warnings/bans will be issued

And finally remember we all do this for fun and exercise so ride on and enjoy the FRR events....stay safe and if it starts to hurt then welcome to the fun zone...! 
(But stop if it really does hurt too much please!)

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: DIRT 505 Friday Endurance Ride
description:
Welcome to the DIRT 505 Friday Endurance Ride!

Please join us weekly on Fridays at a pace of 2.6-2.8w/kg for 90 minutes.

The 505 rides take place Monday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday for 90 minutes at the same time and same consistent pace. Saturday's we ride for 120 minutes.

We kick off our rides with a 5 minute pace at 2.2w/kg to get us warmed up and together as a team. The fence is used throughout the ride to keep everyone together. The fence will not kick you off the ride but we do encourage all our riders to stay together as close to the beacon as possible. Our rides offer a 30 minute late join option.
The ride leader will stay as close to ride pace as possible. We try to change up the routes each week and some of the routes may include some small to moderate climbs.

Our group exists to encourage and build up cyclists around the world no matter your time zone, fitness level, pro or amateur. We exist to encourage and build up a team culture of unity in the cycling community.

STRAVA DIRT CLUB:

https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwiftdirt

FACEBOOK DIRT GROUP:

https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftdirt

name: CRYO-GEN Friday Run
description:
Join our CRYOGEN 5K recovery run to enjoy your weekend. It is open to runners of all abilities so whether you are a recreational runner or an elite athlete you are welcome on the start line. There is no time limit for completing the event so run at your own pace and enjoy the course. 

To find out more about Team CRYO-GEN and what we can offer you, please visit our website https://cryogen.team/ 

If you wish to join us on Discord for this run, please join our server here - https://discord.gg/MkEpFwNz

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Champs Elysees
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: OTR Snap Crackle Pop Punch Time
description:
Snap Crackle Pop Punch Time is a group ride, race & interval training all rolled into one fun challenging event. Unique “race” scoring, where results in ZwiftPower are based on sum of segment times on a route with punchy climbs and/or sprints. Group rides together at ~2wkg, and ride leader provides guidance and lead-outs to smash a segment; then regroup, rinse & repeat. New route every week.

Multiple time slots on Fri-Sun, including Fri Atlantic, Sun APAC and Sun Americas/EMEA.
Riders need to join ZwiftPower.com to see their results as sum of segment times.

Event links: https://www.zwift.com/events/tag/snapcracklepop
Weekly results (across all time slots): https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=2656
In-ride conversation (“SCP Ride” channel): https://discord.gg/B52qdExaW2
Chat, banter and results: https://discord.gg/HNzvx98srF

Group ride with all cats together at ~2w/kg. Yellow beacon / ride leader (when present) will provide instructions for each segment, and drop the fence when it's time to punch/sprint. Fence is for guidance only (non-zapping).

Ride at a relaxed pace between the timed segments.
Work together to optimize draft for faster segment times.
Slow or stop with yellow beacon after each segment to regroup.

All categories start in a single pen.
Results split per WKG category in ZwiftPower.
No power ups, default drafting, no TT bikes.

One of our regular SCP routes is 3.5 laps of Innsbruckring, with 4x Leg Snappers plus 3x sprints (stopping to regroup on the kicker in between). The challenge is to achieve sub 4 mins for the sum of 7 segment times for cats A/B (that's 45 secs per snapper plus 20 secs per sprint), sub 5 mins for cat C, and sub 7 mins for cat D. Best time to beat is 3:33.
Historical results for Leg Snapper: https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=1322

name: Fast Friday Workout
description:
Congratulations, you crushed another week of workouts! If you’re looking to cap off a great week with another can't-miss training session, check out Fast Friday on Zwift. 

A new workout series to put in your weekly run rotation, Fast Friday is a simple and streamlined way to get your heart rate up. We’re focusing on short reps here, clocking in fast intervals that help runners increase their top speed. Short. Sharp. Fast. High-intensity intervals are proven to take your performance to the next level. So lace up and get moving for just 20–30 minutes every Friday before checking out of the office and into the weekend. 

#fastfriday

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Epic Race - Downtown Dolphin
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

#zwiftofficial

name: Group Run 5k
description:
DESCRIPTION

Join us for a 5k group run.   It's run-at-your-own-pace and all are welcome! 

Pick the closest pace group for you, but all groups will start together and you are free to fall back and run ahead. The pace groups designate average pace for the duration of the run. Most groups will start slower and finish faster than the indicated pace. Feel free to mix in some intervals and race your friends.

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit (C)

name: DIRT Friday Morning Sprintapalooza v2
description:
Welcome to the DIRT Friday Morning Sprintapalooza!

Please join us weekly on Fridays to stretch those sprinting muscles with
some of the fastest on Zwift. The beacon will ride at a consistent 2.5w/kg
and call out sprints, typically hitting 4 to 8 per ride. Power-ups are
limited to aero only and our large bunch results in relaxed recovery and a
big, drafty lead-in. You smash the sprint, sag to the beacon, recover, and
repeat!! We will typically ride the same route for several weeks, giving
you a chance to dial in the optimal start location for each sprint, before
moving on to a new location. We will try to highlight popular race routes
and get practice in for upcoming ZRL race locations. Are you strong enough
to be counted in the top 3 this week?!

Our ride includes a 30 minute late join option, so jump in with us and
don’t be afraid of losing your wheel.

Team DIRT is an acronym for Dads Indoors Riding Trainers. Our group exists
to encourage and build up cyclists around the world no matter your time
zone, fitness level, pro or amateur. We exist to encourage and build up a
team culture of unity in the cycling community, especially among moms and
dads who put personal fitness and health high on their agenda.

STRAVA DIRT CLUB:
https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwiftdirt

FACEBOOK DIRT GROUP:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftdirt

eventSubgroups.name: DIRT Friday Morning Sprintapalooza v2 (C)
eventSubgroups.description: Sprintapalooza is back! Work those legs and refine your sprint craft - are you strong enough to end up in the top 3?! Join DIRT for the best way to wrap up the week.

name: TBR Burrito Race
description:
Get on a wheel and stick to it like Mexican refried beans to a tortilla. This Mass start race will smash your legs.

Follow TBR at thebigring.cc to learn more about our events, read ride reports and leave feedback.

#tbr

name: GRIT - HARD TRUTH
description:
Welcome to the Hard Truth climb. This ride will always cover long climbs on big mountains.
We invite you to take training to the next level by adding this ride to your weekly routine. Steep climbs are hard and long steep climbs are really hard, that is the Hard Truth of this ride.

The ride will start with a friendly group ride format with riders staying together before the big climbs start. Enjoy this social time on the ride before the Hard Truth of the climb arrives.

On climbs, strong riders at the front will push the pace and ride at race pace to compete for the win and the best KOM time. Strong riders at the front will likely output over 5 wpk on the climb.

To keep with a more social ride format, many riders will form a group and ride together on the climb. This social group will likely be using power typical of a Cat B ride. Riders are encouraged to find a group and ride together to help each other survive the Hard Truth of these big climbs.

eventSubgroups.name: GRIT - HARD TRUTH (B)
eventSubgroups.description: Click here if you agree to come suffer with us.

name: KISS at Base Training Ride
description:
Join us to work on your endurance and power output at your aerobic threshold (AT) in Zone 2. The exercise will give you endurance and increased performance using fat as energy. A well-developed AT can give you better race performance increase the amount of time before your body uses glycogen stores.

We are now offering three separate paced rides to better accommodate various fitness levels.

The B Cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 3.2 - 3.99 w/kg.
The C Cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 2.5 - 3.19 w/kg.
The D Cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 2.2 - 2.49 w/kg.

Remember this when you approach hills and inclines along the way. Stick together to enjoy the draft and companionship. The ride leader will not exceed the advertised pace at any time - even on hills. Please keep an eye on the leader beacon (yellow) and the sweeper beacon (red) to stay in the blob.

So turn on your graph (press G on computer keyboard or select it from on-screen menu in iOS and Android) and paint it blue. Give the body a good foundation for Zwift racing. Discord server Link: https://discord.gg/kBmXhY2

name: CRYO-GEN Peaky Friday.
description:
The CRYO-GEN Peaky Friday Ride is a social ride for everyone who enjoys a
good climb, with plenty of rolling routes mixed in for variety. Join us
each Friday for a friendly, social spin that offers something for every
type of rider.

Whether you’re a steady D cat rider looking for supportive group miles and
a bit of extra hill practice, or a stronger rider after a fun, relaxed spin
with the option to stretch your legs on the climbs, you’ll find your place
on The Peaky Friday Ride. It’s all about teamwork, good vibes, and enjoying
the ride together, wherever the road takes us!

The yellow beacon will pace at around 2.2 w/kg on the flats and 2.5 w/kg on
the climbs. At times, we’ll turn off the fence and open up a free-pace
section, giving everyone the chance to push harder if they wish, or simply
ride steady with the yellow beacon, who will always maintain the advertised
pace. We regroup at the KOM banner, with plenty of notice before the fence
is reactivated, so everyone can come back together and enjoy the ride as a
group.

For those who enjoy a touch of luxury, we even have a Limo Service run by a
member of the sweep team! This friendly gruppetto offers a more relaxed
pace when needed, ensuring everyone can enjoy the ride at their own rhythm.

All we ask is that you respect the ride leader, help where you can, and
keep it fun and social. We hope you will join us on the hills!

HEALTH: We would advise any rider who is attempting a Zwift ride for the
first time to ensure that their health should always take precedence over
completing any ride. If you feel unwell or unable to continue please STOP

NOTE: Exercise contributes to 25% weight loss; Healthy Eating (Not Diet)
contributes to the other 75%. Be fit and Healthy.

CRYOGEN Race STRAVA Club https://www.strava.com/clubs/CRYO-GEN

CRYOGEN Social STRAVA Club https://www.strava.com/clubs/474562

Team CRYO-GEN Race Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/176410539698267

Team CRYO-GEN Social Facebook Group
https://www.facebook.com/groups/1960420317596866/

name: Brownlee Fitness Hare & Hounds
description:
Brownlee Fitness welcomes you to a Friday hare and hounds style event where 4 groups leave at 1 minute intervals and try to catch the group in front. Work together with your group to stay ahead or catch the group in front. 

A great way to build some fitness ahead of race season.

name: RT Performance Friday Intervals
description: Join RT Performance for a Friday interval workout on the track!

name: DWGZ Friday Surprise!
description:
Welcome!  DWGZ Surprise ride is like a box of chocolates. You never know what you’re gonna get!  Will we sprint? Will we climb? Badge hunting? Who knows! Each week there will be a new adventure.

Join the DWGZ (Determined Whitty Gritty Zwifters) every Friday as we adventure together and best of all you can help choose what we ride the following week.

The yellow beacon will roll at approximately 2.8125 w/kg with some of the best red sweeper beacons in Zwift!
While this ride is about variety, the DWGZ are about culture. We’re a global crew of cyclists who thrive on shared suffering, do hard stuff, lift each other up, and radiate good energy. We ride six days a week at 6:05 AM Eastern US time, building a strong, global cycling community grounded in grit, humor, and heart.

Late join available for 30 minutes — jump in anytime!

name: Stage 1: Zwift Games: Kaze Kicker
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: Vikings Valhalla Frolicking Friday Fun-for-All
description:
Come and join the Vikings & Valhalla team for some Friday fun for all. Whether this is an early morning, midday or an evening ride, the goals of today’s ride are simple: 
1) Ride with yellow beacon as a group, 
2) Enjoy each other’s company/make new friends, 
3) Be positive and 
4) HAVE FUN. 

We aim to keep your heart rate and power profile in zones 1 and 2 as much as possible. We will do our best for this to be an inclusive no drop ride at advertised pace. For more information about our rides go to: https://www.facebook.com/groups/503388660165279/

#vikingsvalhalla

name: Breakfast Club Run
description: Join us every Friday morning for a 60 Minute steady uptempo run. Group A will run at 8.6 mph (13.8 kph). We will being doing a warm up in the starting corals before the run but once the time starts, we'll be off.

description:
ALL INCLUSIVE BANDED SOCIAL GROUP RIDE.
TIME TO RELEASE THE PRESSURES OF MODERN DAY LIFE WITH THIS DAILY FUN GET
TOGETHER.
THESE EVENTS WILL BE LAP OR TIME BASED GENERALLY UP TO 90 MINUTES IN DURATION.
(CELEBRITY SWEEPER INCLUDED)
GXY are a friendly, open and inclusive cycling club, who ride together virtually and in real life. Whether you ride
socially, race, train with intent or just like to mix it up, you are always welcome.

name: Hercules - TGI Friday Fun Part 1 (Bike)
description:
Join our TGIF Friday Fun Ride Out - a super friendly and inclusive group ride on Zwift! We ride with the rubber band enabled, so no one gets dropped, and everyone stays together no matter the pace.

Expect great chat, good vibes, quizzes, fun facts and a welcoming atmosphere for all riders, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun 

#jerseyunlock

name: The HERD Kibbitz and Chinwag
description:
Join us for the Herd’s Kibbitz, Chinwag and Ride while we talk with fun and interesting people like you. Think of our ride as Comedians in Cars Getting Coffee without the cars, without the comedians and without the coffee.

Our special guest for this ride will be YOU!  Come join us for random conversation as we talk with people from all over the world! 

To participate in the lively discussion, you must be on Discord: https://bit.ly/HerdDiscord.  Also, be sure to check us out on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zHerd/

name: Rhino Racing Short Crits
description:
Fast and fun criterium races with five race times every Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, and Saturday.
A power meter or smart trainer is required for entry. A ZwiftPower account is required to be counted in the official results.
View the calendar of all Rhino Racing events: https://www.zwift.com/uk/events/tag/rhinoracing
Do you enjoy these events? We want to hear from you. Share your feedback on the Rhino Racing Discord.
Interested in team racing? We do ZRL, Dirt Racing Series, Club Ladder, and WTRL TTT events. Join us! https://discord.com/invite/wPD4HJ6

name: MHG Run Club
description:
Back in January 2021, Eddie Izzard ran 32 marathons in 31 days. Our community rallied together and joined the action all month long. This inspired us to create the MHG Run Club, which continues Eddie’s incredible efforts of making humanity great.

The MHG Run Club motivates and supports everybody, whether you’re looking for tips to achieve your training goals or looking for a group to bond and socialize with. A light-minded Zwift treadmill runners group, for runners of all abilities, friendly chat and a good laugh :)

Please feel free to join me Clive Finnimore with our official MHG Run Club Lunchtime 5K @ 8KPH on Monday, Wednesday & Fridays, See you there soon :)

Please also join us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/252358412942586/
Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/MHGA
Keep on Running

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: Run 10K Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the longest running daily led running event on Zwift. This was the event that kickstarted the NoblePro Running Club in support of a world record attempt at consecutive daily10k runs.
The event has a healthy group of leaders who are friendly and chatty and will help you achieve your goal, not matter your experience. Feel free to join in the chat and become addicted like we all are.

Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it's not a race.
If you don't want to run 10k then come along for as long as you wish, the support is always appreciated.
The event runs at the same time each day, each day of the week there is a different course.

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

name: ZLDR Weekend Primer
description:
TGIF What better way to get primed for the weekend then a Friday long run! Join Zwift Long-Distance Runners (ZLDR) run club for up to a Half Marathon distance. Whether you want to use this event to get in some easy mileage or to push for a new personal best or anything in between, this is a great session to join! Even if you can’t join for the full 21.1km come for whatever you can. We are a flexible group of runners who want to help you get consistent and get results.

ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your running dreams and help you develop your running skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!

For more ZLDR fun and support, join our groups on social media platforms:

Facebook group:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZLDR2020
Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/

name: USMeS - Friday Formation - 1.8 - 2.2w/kg
description:
Welcome to USMeS - Friday Formation 1.8 – 2.2w/kg Ride
Line up, loosen up, and enjoy a ride that lets you have a little fun while keeping it tight. This is a chance to wake the legs, enjoy the group, and set yourself up either for Rapid Fire, immediately after this ride, or to roll into the weekend feeling sharp instead of flat.
Ride it smooth -- ride it smart -- and -- ride it together.

✅ Pace: an average of 1.8–2.2 w/kg
✅ Duration: 60 minutes
Segments are encouraged. We do push on climbs, and when the pace lifts, make your move then fall back in Formation quickly and help keep the group together.
The goal is a clean, organized ride that flows as one... FORMATION!!
Respect the leader. Respect the pace. Protect the group.
Now Fall In & Hold Formation.

#conqueringlimits
#challengeaccepted

name: Stage 2: Zwift Games: Hudson Hustle | Women Only
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: TGIF DIRTy Goats
description:
If screaming legs and burning lungs make you smile. Welcome to DIRTy Goats.

Every Friday, we encourage you to leave the flats behind and embrace the challenge of the weekly KOM.

An inclusive ride for all wanting to improve their mental toughness, develop climbing technique or simply badge hunt the routes you frequently choose to avoid. DIRTy Goats is the team to motivate you out of your comfort zone.

If you are daunted by the DIRTy Goats, Yellow beacon will stay within the ride limits. Our pace is based on a 75kg rider, riding 2.6w/kg or 195 watts on the flat, and 3.5w/kg or 260 watts on the climb. Lighter and heavier riders wanting to pace with the Leader are asked to adjust their power to work together.

Each ride will target 1000 vertical meters. This is not always achievable within our 90 minute ride, but the team will often keep rolling until we hit our goal.

Stronger riders are encouraged to work with the beacons to help the group. But if you really must fly, we ask that you move away quickly during the warm-up to avoid pulling the front.

Team DIRT is an acronym for Dads Inside Riding Trainers. This group has grown and brought like-minded moms and dads together who love to make time for Zwift around work and family.

Please join us on discord: https://discord.gg/sUnwqPZ

And Facebook at: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZWIFTDIRT

description:
The ODZ Friday Ebb is designed to help riders taper and prepare for the intense ODZ weekend rides. 

The group rides at 2.2w/kg. There are sprints to serve as openers to prime riders’ legs for the Saturday TeamODZ races. Riders regroup after each sprint.  Riders should tag their last name with “ODZ"".  

Go to http://www.TeamODZ.com/Friday-Ebb/ for a full description.

name: Bike MS - Eventful 40 Friday
description:
In addition to our monthly dual jersey unlock rides Bike MS is all about exploring together, so let's explore those event only routes. This 40 minute group ride will rotate different routes for those badge hunters out there. Lead beacon will ride around 2.0, but come for the journey and unlock a kit along the way. 
Bike MS Season if right around the corner, so let's connect over a ride as we prepare for the adventures ahead. Multiple Sclerosis does not stop, so neither will we as we ride together for this great cause.
Bike MS is the largest charity cycling series across the United States consisting of 50 rides and raising over $50 million in 2023 for the National MS Society. Bike MS supports the National MS Society's mission to Cure MS while empowering all people affected by MS to live their best lives. Whether you want to cross the Finish Line in person or take on a new challenge from anywhere — there’s a Bike MS event that’s right for you! 
Check out www.bikeMS.org and experience the ride of your life. Use Zwift24 for a discount on your Bike MS Ride entry fee.
Come join us for weekly Club Rides: Bike MS ZC
#dontjustride #bikeMS #whateverittakes #strongertogether

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Champs Elysees
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: BMTR Banded Warmup
description:
Let’s warm up and enjoy riding together as one group before today's BMTR Short Adventure, which has three separate categories — B, C, and D — starts in 35 minutes.

Since this event is ‘banded,’ everyone can warm up at a pace that suits them best, while the Zwift ‘Rubberband’ keeps us all together.

There are no official Yellow or Red Beacons for this event. However, you can be sure that most of the time, BMTR Ride Leaders and Sweeps that you know and love will be warming up with you!


JOIN US
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/bmtrzwiftclub
- Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/BMTRZwiftClub
- Zwift: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/BMTR/home

ALL WEEKLY BMTR EVENTS

BMTR CUSTOM CLOTHING
- https://bmtrzwift.store

name: Friday Fearless Fartleks
description:
Fartlek, which means speed play in Swedish, is continuous training with interval training. Fartlek runs are a very simple form of a long distance run. Fartlek training is simply defined as periods of fast running intermixed with periods of slower running. For some people, this could be a mix of jogging and sprinting, but for beginners it could be walking with jogging sections added in when possible.

A good laugh and a long run are the two best cures for anything.

Join to challenge yourself and for the group run fun!

Hosted by Team Fearless. To hear about our other rides and runs or learn more about our women's team, head to our Facebook Fans page at https://www.facebook.com/groups/TeamFearlessZR/

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: BMTR Short Adventure
description:
The BMTR Short Adventure is all about having fun as a group while enjoying some endurance-paced cycling.

Our experienced, friendly, and engaging ride leaders ensure everyone has a great time while keeping the ride within their respective category's advertised average pace range!

This event is designed primarily as a "Zone 2 Endurance" ride. The advertised average watts per kilogram (w/kg) range for each category group is calculated to keep most riders within their "Zone 2 Endurance" or low "Zone 3 Tempo" ranges. Participants should select the correct category based on their Functional Threshold Power (FTP) or the category assigned by Zwift.

description:
Join our TGIF Friday Fun Social 5k - a super friendly and inclusive group run on Zwift!

You can walk, jog or race, everyone is welcome.

Expect great chat, good vibes, and a welcoming atmosphere for all runners, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

name: Best Buddies Challenge - Friday FTP Intervals
description:
Join Best Buddies and ride leader, Ben Giust, for an interval workout and
kick off your weekend the right way!
All riders will unlock our exclusive in-game kit, which will then be added
to your Zwift Garage. Wear it proudly anytime you ride and spread the
word about Best Buddies and the Best Buddies Challenge!About Best Buddies
Best Buddies is the world’s largest organization dedicated to ending the
social, physical and economic isolation of the 200 million people with
intellectual and developmental disabilities (IDD). Our programs empower
the special abilities of people with IDD by helping them form meaningful
friendships with their peers, secure successful jobs, live independently,
improve public speaking, self-advocacy and communication skills, and
feel valued by society.
Challenge yourself to change lives at http://bestbuddieschallenge.org/

eventSubgroups.name: Best Buddies Challenge - Friday FTP Intervals (E)

name: The Common Empire  Rise & Ride
description:
Join Common Empire for Friday Rise & Ride group ride. The purpose of this ride is to have fun and end the week on a good note with your fellow cyclists. On this ride, we'll be riding between 2-3.5 w/kg however, it is set as a 'keep everyone together' ride so feel free to go as hard as you'd like.

#jointheride

name: Friday Freight Train
description:
Join Team Endurance Nation for a great weekend kick off ride! This session focuses on steady state riding and is a great way to build up some mileage. All riders are welcome to join this event and be part of our group riding community within Zwift. Feel free to keep riding after the finish to rack up more miles with the group!

Warm Up: Very short. Just enough to build the group.
Main Ride: Steady riding at 2.5 w/kg. Overall average including climbs and finish should be 2.7 w/kg.

TeamEN members chat on an app called Discord. Discord is not required, but the ride experience is enhanced by using it. Click on this link for more information about Discord and related setup: https://www.endurancenation.us/teamen-on-zwift#discord

For more specifics about this ride and various other Endurance Nation rides, go to: https://www.endurancenation.us/teamen-on-zwift

name: FRR CLASSICA SERIES - BELGICA - ITT
description:
Flamme Rouge Racing are excited to bring you our CLASSICA events to honour the great one day monuments of world cycling.

ITALIA
BELGICA
FRANCAIS

Each event will offer 3 races Friday to Sunday, using three formats - iTT / Scratch / Points - each race will convert to points, based on segments and finish - a riders points total will be drawn from all 3 races, do more, score more!

Each event will center around the type of course and terrain of the monument, with the actual race day event being of a length that is fitting for the monument.

Classica races are part of the FRR Weekend Warrior Race Series for which there will be at least 10 WW events, refer to website for the Schedule and rules:

Series Schedule
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-schedule/

Rules
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-rules

Event Basics
- Public events - MIXED RACING
- Five Max 30day ZRS ranged pens
- Mandatory racing experience - HRM - Smart Trainers


- Season long Order of Merit (OoM)
- Best 7 scoring events to count (an event counts the points from all 3 races over

FRR Registered riders form the OoM - Top 10 earn prizes on condition they are FRR Subscribers 

For all details, registration and how to become an FRR subscriber vist our website:
https://flammerougeracing.com/

Primary Communication via DISCORD

Discord - RACE channel for questions, updates and lively chat - it is by far the best place to clarify or report anything during the series

Invite link: https://discord.com/invite/nQNWHQK6PS

Smart Trainers - HRM
- Smart Trainers are mandatory
- Race Control can verify with the Zwift platform 
- HRMs are mandatory

So be SMART and use a SMART trainer as your PRIMARY power source where you can....

FRR Code of Conduct
- We expect the best racing behavior from all riders, if riders have an issue then always contact race control via email first, we will investigate every request raised.
- In race we do not expect riders to abuse others, flag, report to race control, screen shot etc.... riders who ignore this will be DQ'd for the season
- Discord chat remains objective and banter - anything more will be removed and warnings/bans will be issued

And finally remember we all do this for fun and exercise so ride on and enjoy the FRR events....stay safe and if it starts to hurt then welcome to the fun zone...! 
(But stop if it really does hurt too much please!)

name: USMeS – Rapid Fire Friday [C] 2.2 – 2.8w/kg
description:
Welcome to Rapid Fire Friday, where we turn up the heat after our TGIF warm-up ride! This is a sprint-focused session designed to sharpen your top-end power and inject a little adrenaline into your week.

 

✅ Pace: 2.2–2.8 w/kg average between sprints
✅ Duration: ~60 minutes of spicy intervals
✅ Sprints: Frequent, all-out efforts—fence drops for each sprint
✅ Fence: Will be in use between sprints to keep the group tight – please fall in quickly after each effort

 

Ride Format:

Steady pace cruising between sprint segments
Sprint calls will be announced in advance
Fence will come down for each sprint – then we regroup promptly behind the beacon
 

Expectations:
⚡ Bring your A-game for the sprints
⚡ Recover quickly and maintain discipline between efforts
⚡ Respect the Leader (or the fence) and the group – this keeps the ride smooth for everyone

 

Whether you’re chasing a PR or sharpening your legs for race day, Rapid Fire Friday is the perfect way to wrap up your week with purpose and power.

Fall in. Lock on. Fire away.

 

#conqueringlimits

#challengeaccepted

name: Stage 3: Zwift Games: Cobbled Crown
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1

Stage 3

Stage 4

Bonus Stages

*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: ZZRC Latte 2-2.5 Group Ride
description:
Welcome to our ZZRC Latte 2-2.5. This is a group ride, not a race, where we encourage riding together.

Our rides are open to all riders, the category enforcement merely allows us to ensure a safe and quality ride for you the riders and for our group.

In 2015 ZZRC was founded and are one of the oldest established clubs on Zwift .

YELLOW BEACON will pace between 2-2.5 on the ride , with a possible increase of watts on inclines or sprints , but the average for the whole ride will be as advertised.

We strongly promote group riding so on most of our rides we will use the Fence to help encourage that. Using a fence ensures that the ride is not over paced .

In the event of falling off the back of the main group , you will need to pace well over group pace to bridge the gap and catch .

This is where our awesome ZZRC sweeps and Ride Buddies will help you return to group using their draft. They will give you clear encouraging instructions to aid this process .

Our crew are a caring bunch who dedicated a lot of hours to this club , but want you to have the best ride experience on Zwift

You will be fully supported and encouraged throughout the ride by the Leader, Sweeps and Ride Buddies .

Our rides do not allow the use of TT Bikes as they do not draft and will require you to push harder on the ride, and in these instances our Sweeps will not be able to help you .

Mountain bikes operate very similarly, minimum draft so more watts (effort) will be required for the ride and any chase backs to group .

All our rides have a 30 minute late join feature which allows you to rejoin if you have technical issues or you find yourself out of the group in the early stages of the ride. Using this feature SHOULD teleport you back into the main group with our YELLOW BEACON .


We love to have a chat on our rides so join us on our dedicated discord channel
https://discord.gg/QdeS3PtXTX


TOP TIPS

1) Stay close to the ride leader (or just in front on climbs), don’t let a gap form and the elastic snap!

2) Stay away from the Fence – We don’t like to fry anyone

3) Most important of all . . . HAVE FUN AND ENJOY THE RIDE.

#zzrc

Don’t forget to join our ZZRC-We Pace Not Race Facebook page and our club on the companion app.

name: Team ODZ Friday Coffee and Espresso Ride
description:
The ODZ Coffee Ride is a group ride formatted to allow a steady 2.5w/kg warmup, followed by an all out ‘Espresso segment’. Riders must be BEHIND rider leader at the start of the ‘Espresso segment’ to be included in final results. Watch in messaging closely for instructions during ride.

Go to http://www.teamodz.com/coffee-ride/ for a full description.
Join us on discord!! https://discordapp.com/invite/0opEuehwdy1ECPBN

No Categories required!! Just join and show us what you got during Espresso.

eventSubgroups.name: Team ODZ Friday Coffee and Espresso Ride (B)

name: (Rubber-Banded) Ride with James' Friends!
description:
Join (some of) James' friends as we take on a number of different, varied routes across a number of different worlds.

This ride is banded. All riders will stay together regardless of their pace.

To keep up with latest events and news, please join the club here: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/389fbdf0-9cd7-4b42-8f76-4d1b6af240ae

name: Fast Friday Workout
description:
Congratulations, you crushed another week of workouts! If you’re looking to cap off a great week with another can't-miss training session, check out Fast Friday on Zwift. 

A new workout series to put in your weekly run rotation, Fast Friday is a simple and streamlined way to get your heart rate up. We’re focusing on short reps here, clocking in fast intervals that help runners increase their top speed. Short. Sharp. Fast. High-intensity intervals are proven to take your performance to the next level. So lace up and get moving for just 20–30 minutes every Friday before checking out of the office and into the weekend. 

#fastfriday
